description: country in southern Europe
description_wiki: Italy, officially the Italian Republic, is a country in Southern and Western Europe.

description: Italian comune
description_wiki: Varese Ligure (Ligurian: Vaise [ˈvajze]) is a comune (municipality) in the Province of La Spezia in the Italian region Liguria, located about 50 kilometres (31 mi) east of Genoa and about 35 kilometres (22 mi) northwest of La Spezia.

description: Italian city
description_wiki: Genoa ( JEN-oh-ə; Italian: Genova [ˈdʒɛːnova] ; Ligurian: Zêna [ˈzeːna]) is the sixth-largest city in Italy and the capital of the Italian region of Liguria.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: shipbuilding firm in San Francisco
description_wiki: Union Iron Works, located in San Francisco, California, on the southeast waterfront, was a central business within the large industrial zone of Potrero Point, for four decades at the end of the nineteenth and beginning of the twentieth centuries.

description: neighborhood of San Francisco
description_wiki: North Beach is a neighborhood in the northeast of San Francisco adjacent to Chinatown, the Financial District, and Russian Hill.

description: U.S. company that built western leg of the first transcontinental railroad
description_wiki: The Central Pacific Railroad (CPRR) was a rail company chartered by U.S. Congress in 1862 to build a railroad eastwards from Sacramento, California, to complete most of the western part of the "First transcontinental railroad" in North America.

description_wiki: Sacramento is the capital city of the U.S. state of California.

description: city in and county seat of Salt Lake County, Utah, United States and the capital of Utah
description_wiki: Salt Lake City, often shortened to Salt Lake or SLC, is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Utah.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Utah is a landlocked state in the Mountain West subregion of the  Western United States.

description: city in and county seat of Washoe County, Nevada, United States
description_wiki: Reno (, REE-noh) is a city in the northwest section of the U.S. state of Nevada, along the Nevada–California border.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Nevada (  nə-VAD-ə; Spanish: [neˈβaða] ) is a landlocked state in the Western United States.

description: lake in Nevada, United States
description_wiki: Pyramid Lake is the geographic sink of the basin of the Truckee River, 40 mi (64 km) northeast of Reno, Nevada, United States.

description: ethnic groups
description_wiki: The Chinese people, or simply Chinese, are people or ethnic groups identified with China, usually through ethnicity, nationality, citizenship, social construct or other affiliation.

description: residents and citizens of Germany & people of German descent
description_wiki: Germans (German: Deutsche) are the natives or inhabitants of Germany, or sometimes more broadly any people who are of German descent or native speakers of the German language.

description: ethnic group of France
description_wiki: French people (French: Les Français, lit. 'The French') are the individuals who are identified with the country of France, or more broadly, a global  sociolinguistic group that share a common connection through the  French language, culture, and history that originated in Western Europe.

description: ethnic group in Northern Europe
description_wiki: Swedes (Swedish: svenskar), or Swedish people, are an ethnic group native to Sweden, who share a common ancestry, culture, history, and language.

description: people native to any part of Spain or that hold Spanish citizenship
citizens or residents of Mexico
description_wiki: Mexicans (Spanish: Mexicanos) are the citizens and nationals of the  United Mexican States.

ghost town in Box Elder County, Utah, United States
description_wiki: Promontory Point is a ghost town in Box Elder County, Utah, United States, that is located about 1.7 miles (2.7 km) northeast of the cape with the same name.

description: branch of the United States Mint
description_wiki: The San Francisco Mint is a branch of the United States Mint.

description: census-designated place that is the county seat of Storey County, Nevada, United States
description_wiki: Virginia City is a historic town in Storey County, Nevada, United States.
